name: Heroes' Call - A Casual MMO Guild Sim
short_description: Lead your guild and its members to conquer the challenges of perilous dungeons, all through a sleek and vibrant interface.
detailed_description:
You and a few close friends set out to enjoy some quality time together in a popular MMO. Weeks turned into months, and as your appreciation for the game grew, so did your dedication. Along the way, you met like-minded adventurers and decided to form a guild, making it easier to communicate and coordinate.

Time passed, and your guild flourished—so much so that you're now on the verge of assembling a full 40-player raid group to take on the game’s most formidable and prestigious dungeons. One last push, and you'll be ready. But don’t take too long—excitement is building, and your guildmates are eager to test their mettle against these legendary challenges.

Now, it’s time to manage your guild members, fine-tune the roles of your guildies to ensure you’re making the most of their abilities, recruit new allies, farm some components, craft a little bit, invest in elixirs and so on.

Once you feel ready, head to the Dungeons and learn about the bosses you’ll be facing.
